{"id":"project-LICHEN-likj","title":"Integer overflow possible in encode_serial_frame return value","description":"File: lichen/subsys/lichen/meshcore/codec.c
Line: 70-71

```c
return (int)(payload_len + 3U);
```

If CONFIG_LICHEN_MESHCORE_MAX_SERIAL_PAYLOAD is larger than INT_MAX - 3, the addition could exceed INT_MAX. Casting a size_t larger than INT_MAX to int is implementation-defined behavior.

While unlikely in practice (embedded systems rarely have such large payloads), there is no compile-time check to prevent misconfiguration.

Fix: Add BUILD_ASSERT(CONFIG_LICHEN_MESHCORE_MAX_SERIAL_PAYLOAD <= INT_MAX - 3, "Serial payload too large for int return");","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T06:46:12.682964Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-12T06:46:12.682994Z"}
